description: Independent closed-form reference for the pde_simulation_pipeline category. 5 coupled models (AtmosphericDynamics, WildfirePropagation, FireSpreadCalculator, OceanDynamics, AirSeaFluxCalculator) flatten into a single 11-state ODE. The only active dynamics is the per-cell ocean surface-temperature ODE D(SST[o]) = surface_heat_flux[o]/4.18e6, where surface_heat_flux is the atmosphere-grid sensible flux field flux_field=[50,150,250,350] conservatively regridded onto the 3-cell ocean grid by the INLINE overlap weights (bin-skolem broad phase + polygon_intersection_area narrow phase). Overlap areas A=[[1,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0,0.5,0.5]] (atmos 4 x ocean 3), target areas A_o=[2,1.5,0.5], weights W=A/A_o partition to unity, so surface_heat_flux=[100, 850/3, 350] W/m^2. u_ocean is ic-only (no advection) so each SST cell integrates independently and D(SST) is state-independent. Every other state carries no D-equation (wind_u/wind_v/phi/u_ocean) or is heated only when the fire front is active (phi<0, which never happens: phi is ic-only), so T, wind_u, wind_v, phi, fuel, u_ocean hold their ICs and the system is EXACTLY linear: SST(t)=290 + t*surface_heat_flux/4.18e6, closed form (no numerical integrator needed). Derived from the fixture's declared math ONLY, independent of every binding's evaluator.
